title: SEC DG, Vice President, Edo Deputy Governor During Clem Agba Coronation
description: The director General, Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) Mr Lamido Yuguda, Vice president Prof Yemi Osinbajo , Edo State Deputy Governor Mr Philip Shaibu, Minister of Finance Hajia Zainab Ahmed
html: The director General, Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) Mr Lamido Yuguda, Vice president Prof Yemi Osinbajo , Edo State Deputy Governor Mr Philip Shaibu, Minister of Finance Hajia Zainab Ahmed during the Coronation of Minister of State for Budget and National Planning  Prince Clem Ikanade Agba as Ofevwosi of Uneme in Edo State.
